rules: imagery should have high appetite appeal
silo images should be photographed consistently according to packaging or product type
minimize reflections on plastic, foil, and shiny packaging, especially when covering important product information
remove unnecessary stickers not part of package design, such as special promotion stickers or legal declarations
packaging and labels should be presented straight, not angled or crooked
photograph each unique and meaningful side of the product package
for round or irregular shapes, present sides so printed information and graphics are centered and legible
front view is the side with predominant brand and labeling, format, variant, and size/quantity
products should be evenly lit from side to side and top to bottom
exposure and color should correctly represent the item
maintain separation between product and background
clip products onto pure white background, RGB 255/255/255
retouch dirt, dust, fingerprints, damage, blemishes, expiration dates, lot numbers, and sample-only information
lifestyle images should be realistic, professionally lit, and styled appropriately to the item and brand
product being sold should remain the hero of the lifestyle image
packaging should be incorporated into lifestyle images when practical to connect lifestyle images to silo shots
items must display all indicated required images and conditionally required images and meet the minimum image count listed on each page

main_image.label: Main Image
main_image.description: Primary carousel image/hero image for the PDP.

silo_front.label: Silo, Front
silo_front.guidance: Show the product straight-on on a pure white background with all packaging details legible, including safety and age or weight indicators, and show the primary flavor or variety when applicable.
silo_front.recommendation: Add a straight-on front silo image on pure white with packaging details, safety indicators, age or weight indicators, and primary flavor or variety clearly legible.

silo_front_food_formula.label: Silo, Front
silo_front_food_formula.guidance: Show the product straight-on on a pure white background with flavor, age stage, and key claims legible, and show quantity clearly for multi-packs.
silo_front_food_formula.recommendation: Add a straight-on front silo image with flavor, age stage, key claims, and multipack quantity clearly legible.

silo_front_in_pack.label: Silo, Front, In Pack
silo_front_in_pack.guidance: Show the complete product packaging from a straight-on, front-facing angle. Shoot on white with no shadow or keystoning.
silo_front_in_pack.recommendation: Add a straight-on front packaging image on white with no shadow or keystoning.

silo_back_in_pack.label: Back Silo In Pack
silo_back_in_pack.guidance: Photograph the side or back of the product to clearly capture all label information. Shoot straight on with no plunge shots.
silo_back_in_pack.recommendation: Add a straight-on side or back packaging image that clearly captures all label information.

lifestyle_in_use.label: Lifestyle, In-Use
lifestyle_in_use.guidance: Show the product in a realistic, natural setting that reflects everyday use with the product as the focal point and minimal distraction.
lifestyle_in_use.recommendation: Add a lifestyle image showing the product in realistic everyday use with minimal distraction.

lifestyle_caregiver.label: Lifestyle, In-Use
lifestyle_caregiver.guidance: Show a caregiver changing a baby in a clean, warm home setting with natural, diverse representation.
lifestyle_caregiver.recommendation: Add a caregiver lifestyle image showing diapering or changing in a clean, warm home setting.

lifestyle_sleep_nursery.label: Lifestyle, In-Use
lifestyle_sleep_nursery.guidance: Show the product in a calm, warm nursery or sleep setting, including a baby or child if appropriate for scale and relatability.
lifestyle_sleep_nursery.recommendation: Add a nursery or sleep lifestyle image showing the product in a calm, warm setting.

dimensions.label: Dimensions
dimensions.recommendation: Add a dimensions graphic showing product size clearly.

dimensions_assembled.label: Dimensions
dimensions_assembled.guidance: Show assembled dimensions with callout measurements. For convertible furniture, include a configuration diagram showing each stage.
dimensions_assembled.recommendation: Add assembled dimensions with callout measurements and configuration stages when applicable.

feature_graphic.label: Feature Graphic
feature_graphic.guidance: Highlight benefits, usage routines, secondary features, age or stage guidance, developmental benefits, nutritional benefits, safety limits, technology features, or product claims using clean graphic treatment.
feature_graphic.recommendation: Add a clean feature graphic highlighting benefits, usage, stage guidance, developmental value, nutrition, safety limits, or technology features.

graphic_size_guide.label: Graphic, Size Guide
graphic_size_guide.guidance: Display a size, feeding stage, age, diaper, weight, or developmental stage chart with text large enough to be legible at thumbnail size.
graphic_size_guide.recommendation: Add a size or stage guide graphic with text large enough to read at thumbnail size.

graphic_safety.label: Graphic, Safety
graphic_safety.guidance: Call out age suitability, safety certifications, ratings, skin-friendly ingredients, hypoallergenic testing, dermatologist recommendations, or material claims using clean badge iconography.
graphic_safety.recommendation: Add a safety graphic showing age suitability, certifications, ratings, material claims, or skin-friendly claims using clean badges.

material_callout.label: Material Callout
material_callout.guidance: Display material safety claims such as BPA-free, food-grade, safety certifications, or material claims using official logos or badge graphics.
material_callout.recommendation: Add a material callout graphic showing safety claims, BPA-free, food-grade, or certification badges.

graphic_ingredients.label: Graphic, Ingredients
graphic_ingredients.guidance: Call out primary ingredients or absence of additives using a clean list or icon-based graphic.
graphic_ingredients.recommendation: Add an ingredients graphic calling out primary ingredients or absence of additives.

additional_recommendations: Age / Stage Guide: Display the recommended age or developmental stage range for this product.
Certification Graphic: Show BPA-free, organic, JPMA, or other relevant certification badges.
Collection Image: Show the full product line or available configurations in a group arrangement.
Brand Guarantee: Include a satisfaction guarantee or brand trust graphic if applicable.
notes: Preserve repeated feature_graphic because the source page shows two separate feature graphics.
One feature graphic provides a simple visual guide for assembly, feeding prep, or usage routine.
The other feature graphic calls out secondary features such as temperature indicators, anti-slip base, ergonomic design, or size suitability.
Material Callout should display safety certifications and material claims using official logos or clean badge graphics.
Maintain a consistent visual approach across product photography with consistent angles to ensure a unified presentation.
Individual brand guidelines should take precedence.
Baby imagery should clearly communicate safety, age/stage suitability, scale, configuration, usage, and caregiver context where relevant.
